name: Jaipur
description: Jaipur is Sébastien Pauchon's elegant two-player set-collection game set in the Indian spice market — take cards (singly or as a swap with camels) from a market line of six, then sell matching sets of goods for diminishing rupee tokens. Selling early is risky, selling late is rich. Three-round matches in twenty minutes, rewarding tempo and timing. A near-perfect filler for two.
